# BIGTIME POS

## Item 7 Compliance Sample

### List of other reports generated by the Sales Machine/Software with sample print-out of each

Requirement covered:

"List of other reports that can be generated from the Sales Machines/Software with sample print-out of each (i.e., BIR Sales Summary Report, Senior Citizen Sales, PWD Sales, National Athletes and Coaches Sales, Solo Parent Sales, etc.)."

Prepared on: April 14, 2026
System: BIGTIME POS

---

## A. Report List (Based on Current BIGTIME POS Modules)

1. Sales Summary Report
2. BIR Taxes Report
3. BIR Terminal Report (X/Z Reading History)
4. BIR E-Sales Report
5. Receipt Register (Sales Invoice Register)
6. Audit Trail Report
7. Discount Usage Report (includes SC/PWD and other discount categories)
8. Branch Comparison Report
9. Shift Summary Report
10. Cash Balancing Report

---

## B. Sample Print-Out: Sales Summary Report

```text
BIGTIME POS - SALES SUMMARY REPORT
Covered Date: 2026-04-14
Branch: MAIN BRANCH

Gross Sales:      PHP 83,760.00
VATable Sales:    PHP 74,785.71
VAT Amount:       PHP 8,974.29
Discount Total:   PHP 4,918.00
Net Sales:        PHP 77,606.00
Transactions:     98

Software: BIGTIME POS v1.0.0
Generated By: ADMIN-001
Generated At: 2026-04-14 23:59:42
```

## G. Sample Print-Out: Audit Trail Report

```text
BIGTIME POS - AUDIT TRAIL REPORT
Covered Date: 2026-04-14
Branch: MAIN BRANCH

Entry ID   User     Action              Table          Record ID        Timestamp
AT-9142    CSH-001  VOID_TRANSACTION    receipts       SI-000431        14:10:02
AT-9158    CSH-004  REFUND_TRANSACTION  receipts       SI-000433        14:34:57
AT-9171    ADMIN-1  EXPORT_REPORT       reports        SALES_SUMMARY    23:59:42

Software: BIGTIME POS v1.0.0
Generated At: 2026-04-14 23:58:35
```

---

## Item 7 Compliance Notes

1. The report list above is aligned with current BIGTIME POS dashboard report modules and receipt/audit exports.
2. The discount report sample explicitly includes Senior Citizen, PWD, National Athletes/Coaches, and Solo Parent categories (as applicable).
3. Replace sample values with actual generated printouts from your environment before final submission.
